details.failingMessage: Access denied for fulfillmentTrackingInfoUpdate field. Required access: One of `write_assigned_fulfillment_orders`, `write_merchant_managed_fulfillment_orders`, or `write_third_party_fulfillment_orders` access scopes. Also: The user must have permission to fulfill and ship orders.
details.activeCredentialSummary: the active conformance credential is a Shopify user access token (`shpca_...`) sent as raw `X-Shopify-Access-Token` on this host

notes: First fulfillment lifecycle parity scaffold for `fulfillmentTrackingInfoUpdate`. Live capture stays blocked until the conformance credential can update fulfillment tracking info.
